member.name: T:Lpdf.Canvas.CanvasNode
member.summary: Abstract base for all canvas node types. Use to construct instances.

member.name: P:Lpdf.Canvas.CanvasNode.Type
member.summary: The canvas element name (e.g. canvas-rect, canvas-text).

member.name: T:Lpdf.Canvas.CircleNode
member.summary: A canvas-circle node (uniform radii convenience form).

member.name: M:Lpdf.Canvas.CircleNode.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Lpdf.Canvas.EllipseStyle)
member.summary: A canvas-circle node (uniform radii convenience form).

member.name: T:Lpdf.Canvas.Clip
member.summary: Rectangular clip region applied to a canvas layer.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Canvas.Clip.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: Rectangular clip region applied to a canvas layer.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Canvas.EllipseNode
member.summary: A canvas-ellipse node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Canvas.EllipseNode.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Lpdf.Canvas.EllipseStyle)
member.summary: A canvas-ellipse node.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Canvas.EllipseStyle
member.summary: Style for canvas-ellipse and canvas-circle nodes.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Canvas.EllipseStyle.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: Style for canvas-ellipse and canvas-circle nodes.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Canvas.ImageNode
member.summary: A canvas-image node — a raster image at an absolute position.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Canvas.ImageNode.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: A canvas-image node — a raster image at an absolute position.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Canvas.LayerNode
member.summary: A canvas-layer node — a rendering layer containing canvas primitives.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Canvas.LayerNode.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{Lpdf.Canvas.CanvasNode},Lpdf.Canvas.LayerOptions)
member.summary: A canvas-layer node — a rendering layer containing canvas primitives.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Canvas.LayerOptions
member.summary: Style attributes for canvas-layer nodes.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Canvas.LayerOptions.#ctor(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double},Lpdf.Canvas.Transform,Lpdf.Canvas.Clip)
member.summary: Style attributes for canvas-layer nodes.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Canvas.LineCap
member.summary: Line cap style for stroked paths.

member.name: F:Lpdf.Canvas.LineCap.Butt
member.summary: Flat cap at the end point.

member.name: F:Lpdf.Canvas.LineCap.Round
member.summary: Rounded cap beyond the end point.

member.name: F:Lpdf.Canvas.LineCap.Square
member.summary: Square cap beyond the end point.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Canvas.LineJoin
member.summary: Line join style for stroked paths.

member.name: F:Lpdf.Canvas.LineJoin.Miter
member.summary: Pointed join (default).

member.name: F:Lpdf.Canvas.LineJoin.Round
member.summary: Rounded join.

member.name: F:Lpdf.Canvas.LineJoin.Bevel
member.summary: Bevelled join.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Canvas.LineNode
member.summary: A canvas-line node — a straight line segment.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Canvas.LineNode.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Lpdf.Canvas.LineStyle)
member.summary: A canvas-line node — a straight line segment.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Canvas.LineStyle
member.summary: Style for canvas-line nodes.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Canvas.LineStyle.#ctor(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{Lpdf.Canvas.LineCap},System.Nullable{Lpdf.Canvas.LineJoin})
member.summary: Style for canvas-line nodes.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Canvas.PathNode
member.summary: A canvas-path node — an SVG-syntax path.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Canvas.PathNode.#ctor(System.String,Lpdf.Canvas.PathStyle)
member.summary: A canvas-path node — an SVG-syntax path.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Canvas.PathStyle
member.summary: Style for canvas-path nodes.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Canvas.PathStyle.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: Style for canvas-path nodes.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Canvas.RectNode
member.summary: A canvas-rect node — an axis-aligned rectangle.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Canvas.RectNode.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Lpdf.Canvas.RectStyle)
member.summary: A canvas-rect node — an axis-aligned rectangle.

member.summary: Style for canvas-rect nodes.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Canvas.RectStyle.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: Style for canvas-rect nodes.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Canvas.Run
member.summary: A rich-text run inside a canvas-text node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Canvas.Run.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.String)
member.summary: A rich-text run inside a canvas-text node.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Canvas.TextAlign
member.summary: Text alignment for canvas text nodes.

member.name: F:Lpdf.Canvas.TextAlign.Left
member.summary: Left-align text.

member.name: F:Lpdf.Canvas.TextAlign.Center
member.summary: Center-align text.

member.name: F:Lpdf.Canvas.TextAlign.Right
member.summary: Right-align text.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Canvas.TextNode
member.summary: A canvas-text node — positioned text with optional rich-text runs.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Canvas.TextNode.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double,System.String,Lpdf.Canvas.TextStyle,Lpdf.Canvas.Run[])
member.summary: A canvas-text node — positioned text with optional rich-text runs.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Canvas.TextStyle
member.summary: Style for canvas-text nodes.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Canvas.TextStyle.#ctor(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.String,System.Nullable{Lpdf.Canvas.TextAlign},System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: Style for canvas-text nodes.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Canvas.Transform
member.summary: A 6-element affine transform matrix [a, b, c, d, e, f].

member.name: M:Lpdf.Canvas.Transform.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: A 6-element affine transform matrix [a, b, c, d, e, f].

member.name: T:Lpdf.Engine.EncryptOptions
member.summary: RC4-128 encryption options passed to .

member.name: P:Lpdf.Engine.EncryptOptions.UserPassword
member.summary: Open password shown to readers. Empty string = no open password required.

member.name: P:Lpdf.Engine.EncryptOptions.OwnerPassword
member.summary: Owner (permissions) password. Required; must be non-empty.

member.name: P:Lpdf.Engine.EncryptOptions.Permissions
member.summary: Permission flags applied to the document.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Engine.EncryptPermissions
member.summary: PDF permission flags for RC4-128 encryption. All flags default to true (allowed); set to false to restrict.

member.name: P:Lpdf.Engine.EncryptPermissions.Print
member.summary: Allow printing.

member.name: P:Lpdf.Engine.EncryptPermissions.Modify
member.summary: Allow content modification.

member.name: P:Lpdf.Engine.EncryptPermissions.Copy
member.summary: Allow text and graphic extraction.

member.name: P:Lpdf.Engine.EncryptPermissions.Annotate
member.summary: Allow adding or modifying annotations.

member.name: P:Lpdf.Engine.EncryptPermissions.FillForms
member.summary: Allow form field filling.

member.name: P:Lpdf.Engine.EncryptPermissions.Accessibility
member.summary: Allow accessibility tools (screen readers).

member.name: P:Lpdf.Engine.EncryptPermissions.Assemble
member.summary: Allow page insertion, deletion, and rotation.

member.name: P:Lpdf.Engine.EncryptPermissions.PrintHq
member.summary: Allow high-quality printing.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Engine.EngineException
member.summary: Thrown when the lpdf engine returns a layout or parse error.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Engine.EngineException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Thrown when the lpdf engine returns a layout or parse error.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Engine.EngineOptions
member.summary: Construction-time configuration for . Passed once at construction; applies to every subsequent render call.

member.name: P:Lpdf.Engine.EngineOptions.SrcFallback
member.summary: File-read callback for resolving font src paths at render time. On the server this can be set to System.IO.File.ReadAllBytes. In sandboxed environments supply all bytes via instead.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Engine.RenderOptions
member.summary: Per-call options passed to or .

member.name: P:Lpdf.Engine.RenderOptions.FontBytes
member.summary: Pre-loaded font bytes for custom fonts referenced via fonts src="…". Keys are the font token names used in the document; values are raw TTF/OTF bytes.

member.name: P:Lpdf.Engine.RenderOptions.ImageBytes
member.summary: Pre-loaded image bytes for images referenced via . Keys are the image names declared in ; values are raw PNG/JPEG bytes.

member.name: P:Lpdf.Engine.RenderOptions.CreatedOn
member.summary: Optional ISO 8601 creation timestamp (e.g. "2024-06-01T12:00:00"). When provided, written as /CreationDate in the PDF info dictionary. Omitting this keeps builds reproducible (no embedded timestamp).

member.name: P:Lpdf.Engine.RenderOptions.Data
member.summary: Optional data object for resolving data-* binding attributes in the XML template. Pass or omit to render with inline fallback content. Only applies when rendering an XML string.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Engine.WasmRunner
member.summary: Thin wrapper around the Wasmtime.NET engine that loads the embedded lpdf.wasm WASI binary and exposes render/render_tree as synchronous string-in / string-out calls, and render_pdf / render_tree_pdf as calls that return raw PDF bytes.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Engine.WasmRunner.Render(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Render an lpdf XML document and return the RenderTree JSON string.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Engine.WasmRunner.RenderTree(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Render an lpdf JSON tree and return the RenderTree JSON string.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Engine.WasmRunner.RenderPdf(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Byte[]},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Byte[]},System.Func{System.String,System.Byte[]},System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Render an lpdf XML document to raw PDF bytes. Custom fonts are base64-encoded into the request envelope. If is provided, a preliminary render call is made to discover font src paths so they can be resolved before the PDF render call.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Engine.WasmRunner.RenderTreePdf(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Byte[]},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Byte[]},System.Func{System.String,System.Byte[]},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Render an lpdf JSON document tree to raw PDF bytes.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Engine.WasmRunner.KitToXml(System.String)
member.summary: Convert a JSON kit-tree (produced by LpdfKit) to an lpdf XML string.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Kit.Document
member.summary: Root document node — passed to .

member.name: M:Lpdf.Kit.Document.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Collections.Generic.List{Lpdf.Kit.SectionNode})
member.summary: Root document node — passed to .

member.name: P:Lpdf.Kit.Document.Version
member.summary: Schema version; always 1.

member.name: P:Lpdf.Kit.Document.Type
member.summary: Node type discriminator; always "document".

member.name: T:Lpdf.Kit.DocumentMeta
member.summary: PDF document metadata written into the output file.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Kit.DocumentMeta.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: PDF document metadata written into the output file.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Kit.DocumentOptions
member.summary: Document-level attributes applied as defaults to every section.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Kit.DocumentOptions.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,Lpdf.Kit.DocumentTokens,Lpdf.Kit.DocumentMeta)
member.summary: Document-level attributes applied as defaults to every section.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Kit.DocumentTokens
member.summary: Design-token overrides applied to the whole document.
Design-token overrides applied to the whole document.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Kit.Font
member.summary: Abstract base for a font definition used in .

member.name: T:Lpdf.Kit.FontBuiltin
member.summary: One of the lpdf built-in fonts, referenced by name.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Kit.FontBuiltin.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: One of the lpdf built-in fonts, referenced by name.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Kit.FontSrc
member.summary: Font loaded from a file path or URL supplied via .

member.name: M:Lpdf.Kit.FontSrc.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Font loaded from a file path or URL supplied via .

member.name: T:Lpdf.Kit.Orientation
member.summary: Page orientation applied to a section or document.

member.name: F:Lpdf.Kit.Orientation.Portrait
member.summary: Portrait (taller than wide).

member.name: F:Lpdf.Kit.Orientation.Landscape
member.summary: Landscape (wider than tall).

member.name: T:Lpdf.Kit.SectionCanvas
member.summary: A canvas block inside a , containing canvas layer nodes. Produced by .

member.name: M:Lpdf.Kit.SectionCanvas.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{Lpdf.Canvas.LayerNode},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: A canvas block inside a , containing canvas layer nodes. Produced by .

member.name: T:Lpdf.Kit.SectionContent
member.summary: Abstract base for content that can appear directly inside a . Use or to create instances.

member.name: P:Lpdf.Kit.SectionContent.Type
member.summary: The element type name emitted to the wire format.

member.name: T:Lpdf.Kit.SectionLayout
member.summary: A layout block inside a , containing layout nodes. Produced by .

member.name: M:Lpdf.Kit.SectionLayout.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{Lpdf.Layout.Node},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: A layout block inside a , containing layout nodes. Produced by .

member.name: T:Lpdf.Kit.SectionNode
member.summary: A serialised section (page) node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Kit.SectionNode.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{Lpdf.Kit.SectionContent})
member.summary: A serialised section (page) node.

member.name: P:Lpdf.Kit.SectionNode.Type
member.summary: The element type; always "section".

member.name: T:Lpdf.Kit.SectionOptions
member.summary: Attributes for the section (page) element.

member.summary: Attributes for the section (page) element.

member.summary: A serialised barcode node.

member.summary: A serialised layout container node (stack, flank, grid, table, etc.).

member.name: T:Lpdf.Layout.Content
member.summary: A text content item — either a raw string or a .

member.name: T:Lpdf.Layout.RawText
member.summary: A plain-text run inside a text node. Implicitly convertible from .

member.summary: A plain-text run inside a text node. Implicitly convertible from .

member.name: T:Lpdf.Layout.Node
member.summary: Discriminated union of all layout nodes. Use to construct.

member.name: P:Lpdf.Layout.Node.Type
member.summary: The lpdf element name (e.g. stack, text, img).

member.name: T:Lpdf.Layout.Pin
member.summary: Pin positioning helper — an absolute-position anchor for a node within its container. Pass as the pin attribute value using .

member.name: M:Lpdf.Layout.Pin.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Pin positioning helper — an absolute-position anchor for a node within its container. Pass as the pin attribute value using .

member.name: M:Lpdf.Layout.Pin.ToString
member.summary: Renders the pin as a CSS shorthand string, e.g. "top:10pt right:20pt".

member.name: T:Lpdf.Layout.RegionNode
member.summary: A serialised region node — an absolutely positioned overlay/underlay block.

member.name: T:Lpdf.LpdfCanvas
M:Lpdf.LpdfCanvas.Layer(Lpdf.Canvas.CanvasNode[],Lpdf.Canvas.LayerOptions)
member.summary: Build a canvas-layer node containing canvas primitives.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfCanvas.Rect(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Lpdf.Canvas.RectStyle)
member.summary: Build a canvas-rect node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfCanvas.Line(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Lpdf.Canvas.LineStyle)
member.summary: Build a canvas-line node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfCanvas.Ellipse(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Lpdf.Canvas.EllipseStyle)
member.summary: Build a canvas-ellipse node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfCanvas.Circle(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Lpdf.Canvas.EllipseStyle)
member.summary: Build a canvas-circle node (uniform radii convenience form).

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfCanvas.Path(System.String,Lpdf.Canvas.PathStyle)
member.summary: Build a canvas-path node from an SVG path string.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfCanvas.Text(System.Double,System.Double,System.String,Lpdf.Canvas.TextStyle,Lpdf.Canvas.Run[])
member.summary: Build a canvas-text node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfCanvas.Image(System.Double,System.Double,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: Build a canvas-image node.

member.name: T:Lpdf.LpdfEngine
member.summary: Stateful lpdf renderer. Construct once with a license key; call or as many times as needed.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfEngine.#ctor(System.String,Lpdf.Engine.EngineOptions)
member.param: Your lpdf license key. Pass an empty string to render in evaluation mode (produces a visible watermark).
Engine-level options applied to every call (e.g. SrcFallback).

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfEngine.SetEncryption(Lpdf.Engine.EncryptOptions)
member.summary: Configure RC4-128 encryption for all subsequent calls. Pass to clear previously set encryption.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfEngine.LoadFont(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Register raw TTF/OTF bytes for a font name referenced via fonts src="…". Call before . Returns this.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfEngine.LoadImage(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Register raw PNG or JPEG bytes for an image name referenced via . Call before . Returns this.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfEngine.RenderPdf(System.String,Lpdf.Engine.RenderOptions)
member.summary: Render an lpdf XML string to PDF bytes.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfEngine.RenderPdf(Lpdf.Kit.Document,Lpdf.Engine.RenderOptions)
member.summary: Render a tree (built with ) to PDF bytes.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfEngine.KitToXml(Lpdf.Kit.Document)
member.summary: Convert a tree (built with ) to an lpdf XML string.
member.returns: A well-formed XML string with an <?xml ...?> declaration.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfEngine.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the WASM runtime resources held by this engine.

member.name: T:Lpdf.LpdfKit
M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Section(Lpdf.Kit.SectionContent[],Lpdf.Kit.SectionOptions)
member.summary: Build a section (page) node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Layout(Lpdf.Layout.Node[])
member.summary: Wrap layout nodes into a layout block for use inside a .

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Canvas(Lpdf.Canvas.LayerNode[])
member.summary: Wrap canvas layer nodes into a canvas block for use inside a .

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Document(Lpdf.Kit.SectionNode[],Lpdf.Kit.DocumentOptions)
member.summary: Build the root document node, ready for .

member.name: T:Lpdf.LpdfLayout
M:Lpdf.LpdfLayout.Stack(Lpdf.Layout.Node[],Lpdf.Layout.StackOptions)
member.summary: Build a stack layout node (vertical column).

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfLayout.Flank(Lpdf.Layout.Node[],Lpdf.Layout.FlankOptions)
member.summary: Build a flank layout node (horizontal row).

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfLayout.Split(Lpdf.Layout.Node[],Lpdf.Layout.SplitOptions)
member.summary: Build a split layout node (two-column split).

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfLayout.Cluster(Lpdf.Layout.Node[],Lpdf.Layout.ClusterOptions)
member.summary: Build a cluster layout node (wrapping flex row).

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfLayout.Grid(Lpdf.Layout.Node[],Lpdf.Layout.GridOptions)
member.summary: Build a grid layout node (multi-column grid).

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfLayout.Frame(Lpdf.Layout.Node[],Lpdf.Layout.FrameOptions)
member.summary: Build a frame layout node (fixed-size container).

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfLayout.Link(Lpdf.Layout.Node[],Lpdf.Layout.LinkOptions)
member.summary: Build a link layout node (hyperlink wrapper).

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfLayout.Table(Lpdf.Layout.Node[],Lpdf.Layout.TableOptions)
member.summary: Build a table layout node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfLayout.Thead(Lpdf.Layout.Node[],Lpdf.Layout.TheadOptions)
member.summary: Build a thead table header row group.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfLayout.Tr(Lpdf.Layout.Node[],Lpdf.Layout.TrOptions)
member.summary: Build a tr table row.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfLayout.Td(Lpdf.Layout.Node[],Lpdf.Layout.TdOptions)
member.summary: Build a td table cell.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfLayout.Divider(Lpdf.Layout.DividerOptions)
member.summary: Build a divider horizontal rule node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfLayout.Img(Lpdf.Layout.ImgOptions)
member.summary: Build an img image node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfLayout.Barcode(Lpdf.Layout.BarcodeOptions)
member.summary: Build a barcode node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfLayout.Text(Lpdf.Layout.Content[],Lpdf.Layout.TextOptions)
member.summary: Build a text paragraph node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfLayout.Text(System.String)
member.summary: Wrap a plain string as inline for use in .

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfLayout.Span(System.String[],Lpdf.Layout.SpanOptions)
member.summary: Build a span inline node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfLayout.Region(Lpdf.Layout.Node[],Lpdf.Layout.RegionOptions)
member.summary: Build a region node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfLayout.Field(Lpdf.Layout.FieldOptions)
member.summary: Build a field form node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Shared.AttrsHelper.Attrs(System.Object)
member.summary: Reflect over any options record and convert its non-null string properties to a kebab-case attribute dictionary.

member.name: M:Lpdf.Shared.AttrsHelper.PascalToKebab(System.String)
member.summary: PascalCase → kebab-case (e.g. FontSize → font-size).

member.name: T:Lpdf.Shared.PageScope
member.summary: Well-known page scope values for and . Raw range strings such as "2-4", "1,3-5", or "2-last" may be passed directly without using these constants.

member.name: F:Lpdf.Shared.PageScope.Each
member.summary: Apply to every page.

member.name: F:Lpdf.Shared.PageScope.First
member.summary: Apply to the first page only.

member.name: F:Lpdf.Shared.PageScope.Last
member.summary: Apply to the last page only.

member.name: F:Lpdf.Shared.PageScope.Odd
member.summary: Apply to odd-numbered pages.

member.name: F:Lpdf.Shared.PageScope.Even
member.summary: Apply to even-numbered pages.
